probeCmd: echo '###PROBE_BEGIN###' && echo '###ENGINES###' && for P in mongod mysqld redis-server; do PID=$(pgrep -o $P 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PID" ]; then LISTEN=$(ss -lntp 2>/dev/null | grep "pid=$PID" | head -1); PORT=$(echo "$LISTEN" | awk '{print $4}' | grep -oE '[0-9]+$' | head -1); if [ -z "$PORT" ]; then case $P in mongod) GUESS=27017;; mysqld) GUESS=3306;; redis-server) GUESS=6379;; esac; if ss -lnt 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $4}' | grep -qE ":${GUESS}$"; then PORT=$GUESS; fi; fi; BIND=$(echo "$LISTEN" | awk '{print $4}' | sed 's/:.*//'); if [ "$BIND" = "*" ] || [ "$BIND" = "0.0.0.0" ] || [ "$BIND" = "::" ] || [ -z "$BIND" ]; then BIND="127.0.0.1"; fi; echo "engine=$P PID=$PID PORT=${PORT} BIND=${BIND}"; fi; done; echo '###PERF###' && (command -v perf 2>/dev/null || echo MISSING) && echo '###OFFCPU###' && (command -v offcputime-bpfcc 2>/dev/null || echo MISSING) && echo '###PROBE_END###'; true
osBatchCmd: echo '###OS_BATCH_BEGIN###' ; echo '###THP###' && cat /sys/kernel/mm/transparent_hugepage/enabled 2>/dev/null || echo unknown && echo '###NUMA_NODES###' && ls -d /sys/devices/system/node/node* 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo '###NUMA_BAL###' && cat /proc/sys/kernel/numa_balancing 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###HUGEPAGES###' && cat /proc/sys/vm/nr_hugepages 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###MEM###' && awk '/MemTotal/{print int($2/1024)}' /proc/meminfo && echo '###IOSCHED###' && cat /sys/block/{vda,sda,nvme0n1}/queue/scheduler 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 || echo none && echo '###SWAP###' && cat /proc/sys/vm/swappiness 2>/dev/null || echo -1 && echo '###ARCH###' && uname -m && echo '###KERNEL###' && uname -r && echo '###NPROC###' && nproc 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###IOSTAT###' && iostat -xdm 1 2 2>/dev/null | tail -n +4 | head -20 || echo 'N/A' && echo '###DISKUSAGE###' && df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $5}' | tr -d '%' || echo 0 && echo '###TCPRETRANS###' && cat /proc/net/snmp 2>/dev/null | awk '/Tcp:/{if(NR%2==0){retrans=$13; segs=$12; if(segs>0) printf "%.4f", retrans/segs*100; else print 0}}' || echo 0 && echo '###CPUGOV###' && cat /sys/devices/system/cpu/cpu*/cpufreq/scaling_governor 2>/dev/null | sort -u | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//' || echo SKIP && echo '###SOMAXCONN###' && sysctl -n net.core.somaxconn 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###TCPKEEPALIVE###' && sysctl -n net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_time 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###TCPKEEPALIVEINTVL###' && sysctl -n net.ipv4.tcp_keepalive_intvl 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###DIRTYRATIO###' && sysctl -n vm.dirty_ratio 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###DIRTYBGRATIO###' && sysctl -n vm.dirty_background_ratio 2>/dev/null || echo 0 && echo '###SMT###' && lscpu 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '/^Thread\(s\) per core/{gsub(/ /,"",$2); print $2}' || echo 0 && echo '###IRQBALANCE###' && systemctl is-active irqbalance 2>/dev/null || echo unknown && echo '###VIRT###' && systemd-detect-virt 2>/dev/null || echo unknown && echo '###SYSVENDOR###' && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/sys_vendor 2>/dev/null || echo unknown && echo '###PRODUCT###' && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_name 2>/dev/null || echo unknown && echo '###OS_RELEASE###' && (grep -E '^(ID|ID_LIKE|VERSION_ID)=' /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null | head -3) || echo unknown && echo '###CPU_MODEL###' && (lscpu 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'Model name|Vendor ID|^CPU implementer|BIOS Model name' | head -3) || echo unknown && echo '###LSE_CPU###' && (lscpu 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '^Flags:' | head -1) || echo unknown && echo '###LSE_DMESG###' && (dmesg -T 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'LSE atomics|CPU features' | head -3) || echo empty && echo '###LSE_MYSQLD###' && (MYSQLD=$(command -v mysqld 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$MYSQLD" ]; then objdump -d "$MYSQLD" 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '[[:space:]](cas|casa|casal|ldadd|ldadda|ldaddal|swp|swpa|swpal|ldset|ldseta)[[:space:]]' || echo 0; else echo na; fi) && echo '###LSE_MONGOD###' && (MONGOD=$(command -v mongod 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$MONGOD" ]; then objdump -d "$MONGOD" 2>/dev/null | grep -cE '[[:space:]](cas|casa|casal|ldadd|ldadda|ldaddal|swp|swpa|swpal|ldset|ldseta)[[:space:]]' || echo 0; else echo na; fi) && echo '###PAGESIZE###' && (getconf PAGESIZE 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && echo '###NUMA_DIST###' && (numactl -H 2>/dev/null | awk '/distances/{p=1; next} p && NF' || echo unknown) && echo '###SCHED_STEAL###' && (grep -oE 'sched_steal_node_limit=[0-9]+' /proc/cmdline 2>/dev/null || echo none) && echo '###SCHED_FEATURES###' && (cat /sys/kernel/debug/sched_features 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo unknown) && echo '###NOHZ_CMDLINE###' && (grep -oE 'nohz=[a-z]+' /proc/cmdline 2>/dev/null || echo none) && echo '###VM_ZONE_RECLAIM###' && (sysctl -n vm.zone_reclaim_mode 2>/dev/null || echo -1) && echo '###VM_MAX_MAP_COUNT###' && (sysctl -n vm.max_map_count 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && echo '###VM_OVERCOMMIT###' && (sysctl -n vm.overcommit_memory 2>/dev/null || echo -1) && echo '###TCP_MAX_SYN_BACKLOG###' && (sysctl -n net.ipv4.tcp_max_syn_backlog 2>/dev/null || echo 0); true

dbBatchTemplates.mongo: echo '###DB_BATCH_BEGIN###' ; mongosh --host '__BIND__' --port '__DB_PORT__' __AUTH_ARGS__ --quiet --eval 'var ss = db.serverStatus(); var ssLight = {host: ss.host, version: ss.version, uptime: ss.uptime, connections: ss.connections, wiredTiger: ss.wiredTiger ? {cache: ss.wiredTiger.cache} : undefined}; var co = db.currentOp(); var coLight = {inprog: (co.inprog || []).filter(function(o){return o.active;}).map(function(o){return {active: o.active, secs_running: o.secs_running, op: o.op};})}; var oplog = null; try { var local = db.getSiblingDB("local"); var ol = local.oplog.rs.find().sort({$natural:-1}).limit(1).next(); var of = local.oplog.rs.find().sort({$natural:1}).limit(1).next(); if(ol && of) { oplog = {last: ol.ts, first: of.ts, windowHours: (ol.ts.getTime() - of.ts.getTime()) / 3600}; } } catch(e) {} var blockCompressor = ""; try { var opts = db.adminCommand({getCmdLineOpts: 1}); var sc = (opts.parsed || {}).storage || {}; var wt = sc.wiredTiger || {}; blockCompressor = ((wt.collectionConfig || {}).blockCompressor) || ""; if (!blockCompressor) { var rc = db.adminCommand({getParameter: 1, wiredTigerEngineRuntimeConfig: 1}); var cfg = rc.wiredTigerEngineRuntimeConfig || ""; var m = cfg.match(/block_compressor=([\w]+)/); if (m) blockCompressor = m[1]; } } catch(e) {} print(JSON.stringify({serverStatus: ssLight, currentOp: coLight, oplog: oplog, blockCompressor: blockCompressor}))'
dbBatchTemplates.mysql: MYSQL_PWD='__PWD__' mysql -h __BIND__ -P __DB_PORT__ -u __USER__ -N --batch --protocol=TCP -e "SELECT '###VERSION###'; SELECT VERSION(); SELECT '###VARIABLES###'; SHOW GLOBAL VARIABLES WHERE Variable_name IN ('innodb_buffer_pool_size','innodb_log_file_size','innodb_flush_log_at_trx_commit','innodb_flush_method','innodb_io_capacity','innodb_thread_concurrency','innodb_lock_wait_timeout','innodb_file_per_table','max_connections','sync_binlog','log_bin','slow_query_log','long_query_time','query_cache_size','binlog_format','transaction_isolation','wait_timeout','interactive_timeout'); SELECT '###STATUS###'; SHOW GLOBAL STATUS WHERE Variable_name IN ('Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests','Innodb_buffer_pool_reads','Innodb_buffer_pool_pages_total','Innodb_buffer_pool_pages_free','Innodb_buffer_pool_pages_dirty','Innodb_row_lock_waits','Innodb_row_lock_time_avg','Innodb_data_reads','Innodb_data_writes','Threads_connected','Threads_running','Aborted_connects','Slow_queries','Questions','Uptime','Threads_cached','Connections','Com_select','Com_insert','Com_update','Com_delete','Handler_read_rnd','Handler_read_rnd_next','Table_open_cache_hits','Table_open_cache_misses'); SELECT '###PROCESSLIST###'; SELECT ID, USER, HOST, DB, COMMAND, TIME, STATE, LEFT(INFO, 200) FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST WHERE COMMAND != 'Sleep' ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT '###SCHEMA_STATS###'; SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, COUNT(*) AS tables, SUM(DATA_LENGTH+INDEX_LENGTH)/1024/1024 AS total_mb FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA NOT IN ('mysql','information_schema','performance_schema','sys') GROUP BY TABLE_SCHEMA;"
dbBatchTemplates.redis: AUTH='' && [ -n '__PWD__' ] && AUTH='-a __PWD__ --no-auth-warning'; echo '###INFO###' && redis-cli $AUTH -h __BIND__ -p __DB_PORT__ INFO all 2>/dev/null && echo '###CONFIG###' && redis-cli $AUTH -h __BIND__ -p __DB_PORT__ CONFIG GET '*' 2>/dev/null && echo '###SLOWLOG###' && redis-cli $AUTH -h __BIND__ -p __DB_PORT__ SLOWLOG GET 10 2>/dev/null && echo '###CLIENT###' && redis-cli $AUTH -h __BIND__ -p __DB_PORT__ CLIENT LIST 2>/dev/null && echo '###MEMORY###' && redis-cli $AUTH -h __BIND__ -p __DB_PORT__ MEMORY STATS 2>/dev/null || true; echo '###BIGKEYS_SAMPLE###' && redis-cli $AUTH -h __BIND__ -p __DB_PORT__ --bigkeys 2>/dev/null | tail -30 || true
